channel.title: Thock Report
channel.description: Fresh takes for mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts.

item.title: The builds checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified builds purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of keycaps
item.description: The most common early stumbles in keycaps, and the cheap corrections that fix them for mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts.

item.title: "best budget mechanical keyboard" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about best budget mechanical keyboard through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your group buys questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the group buys questions mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in builds with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest builds adjustments that mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: best budget mechanical keyboard
item.description: The persistent myths around best budget mechanical keyboard, stress-tested against what mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your switches in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying switches project for mechanical keyboard builders — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/CustomKeyboards is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the group buys community this week.

item.description: A practical on-ramp to keycaps for mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "best budget mechanical keyboard" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "best budget mechanical keyboard" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why mechanical keyboard builders are rethinking Builds
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts approach builds — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Group Buys on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in group buys — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Keycaps: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping keycaps for mechanical keyboard builders and enthusiasts.
